recentTweets.text:
🚨There’s an air quality alert in effect🚨

Protect yourself and your family by staying inside and wearing a mask if you have to be outside.

Seek medical care immediately if you have chest pain or severe shortness of breath.

Sign up for air quality alerts:

President Trump slashed the CDC’s budget, including the program that tracks & prevents infectious diseases.

Now, people are paying the consequences. Over 5,000 Michiganders have contracted cyclosporiasis, a parasitic infection that’s spread nationwide.

We’re demanding answers.

Russell Vought, author of Project 2025 and all the budget cuts, finally decided to testify for the @USHouseFSC (he's obligated by law).

Now we have it on record that he thinks he works for the President.

Wrong. You work for the American people, Russell. https://t.co/TCteFuZirZ

Wildfire smoke is producing some of the worst recorded air quality in Detroit's history. You can stay updated on the latest Air Quality Index numbers and get guidance for keeping you and your family safe at https://t.co/1oM79Ww1wn. https://t.co/x0PHuikruL

I voted YES to stop $3.3B to fund Israel’s destruction in Palestine, Lebanon, and Iran.

When we need to fund healthcare, there’s no money.
When we need to fund housing, there’s no money.

But for the genocide of Palestinians, they find billions of dollars.

This must end.

Tomorrow, July 16th at 1:00PM the Michigan Public Service Commission is holding a public meeting that you can join virtually or by phone. This is your chance to share your concerns with the people who regulate DTE. 

You can find information on how to join here: https://t.co/CVzePEBPUF

Teenage twins, Angely and Alexka, were kidnapped by ICE and are now in a detention center in El Paso.

I’m urging for their immediate release, alongside state and local elected officials, their teachers, and a pastor at their church. We all want them home.

Release them NOW. https://t.co/kI7ySAQLXG

There are over 3,309 cases of cyclosporiasis in Michigan. Keep you and your family safe through these actions:

✅ Wash all produce
✅ Cook produce instead of eating raw vegetables or fruit
✅ Seek medical care if you experience severe diarrhea, nausea, and fatigue

ICE is a rogue paramilitary organization carrying out Trump and Stephen Miller's murderous fantasies.  A system designed to terrorize our families, lock our neighbors in cages, and inflict suffering on our communities can never be reformed. ABOLISH ICE.

Rising housing costs are crushing families in the 12th District and across America. Our Housing Our Communities Act affirms that access to safe, affordable housing is a human right by funding efforts to increase the affordable housing supply in our neighborhoods. I’m proud that https://t.co/TMxth7I5en

My heart is broken for the family of Nolan Wells.

After 6 days, they are still waiting for answers.

Nolan's family deserves truth, transparency, accountability, and a thorough investigation. We must confront the deadly reality of how anti-Blackness and white supremacy continue

If you receive SNAP benefits and lost power for at least 4 hours this past weekend, you may fill out a waiver to reimburse benefits. Losses must be reported online through MI Bridges or in person at a Michigan Department of Health and Human Services office.

The devastation in Venezuela is horrific. I am praying for all the families mourning or searching for loved ones. The people of Venezuela need support. The US must lift the cruel economic sanctions that are making recovery more difficult.

Detroiters say HELL NO to data centers! I fully support the calls from residents for a citywide moratorium to keep these toxic nightmares out of our communities. Our neighborhoods need real legal protections, not sweetheart deals for Big Tech and DTE.
https://t.co/ghA9we2tQt

You can read the press release here. 
https://t.co/pQ9Dmh6Cme

You can read the press release here. 
https://t.co/T7ujUozPyP

You can read the press release here. 
https://t.co/nU1RALcyTC

You can read the press release here. 

https://t.co/6t88yNGaSk

Unfair and inaccurate credit reports shouldn't drag you down, especially if you were targeted by a scam, forced into medical debt, or survived abuse.

That’s why I introduced the FAIR Credit Act. My bill would correct history for victims of predatory lending, fraud, and financial https://t.co/6v39z77puE

Free Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya. After 18+ months in illegal detention, his life is at risk from torture and abuse by the Israeli regime. Dr. Abu Safiya is a hero who saved countless lives amid genocide as the director of Gaza's Kamal Adwan Hospital. That's why he is targeted.

Lorenzo Salgado Araujo should still be alive today. But an ICE officer shot and killed him in Houston during a traffic stop arrest.

ICE has repeatedly lied about killing people in cold blood. His family deserves the truth, and our entire country needs ICE to be abolished.

Ready to learn how to speak truth to power? My office is now accepting applications for our Fall Internship Program in both our Washington, D.C. and District offices.

Applications for our Washington, D.C. and District internships close August 1st. Learn more and apply for https://t.co/JxJZvnujhT
My residents don't need swag bags. We need our spoiled medicine and groceries paid for, and Congress to pass my Make DTE Pay Act now.

I joined @RepBeatty and 25 colleagues in calling for a new issuance of Special Drawing Rights: a simple measure to help stabilize the global economy, save lives, and create jobs for American workers in the process — all without costing the US a dime. https://t.co/T34QOhQ6XT

Today marks 1,000 days since the start of Israel's ongoing genocide in Gaza. To this day, Palestinians continue to be massacred by this apartheid regime with the full backing of our government. We need a full arms embargo now and to bring perpetrators to justice. Free Palestine.

Our families are hurting. Congress must pass the Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act.

“Two-thirds say they are struggling today and need relief they can feel right away. And the most cited concern is grocery costs."

https://t.co/c8KRB4FRhT

Trump’s corrupt Supreme Court majority’s latest ruling isn’t about protecting women or girls—it’s about erasing trans lives and legalizing discrimination. 

To my trans neighbors, know that we will continue fighting for your right to be seen and heard. You are not alone.

The Black maternal health crisis didn't happen by accident. It's the result of policy choices, systemic racism, and decades of neglect. This week, the Congressional Mamas' Caucus hosted a shadow hearing to honor the lives behind the statistics and demand action. https://t.co/Djuh0M7IZI

Working people keep our country running. No one should have to work more than one job to survive in the richest country in the world.

Every single worker in our country deserves dignity and a livable wage. It is time for Congress to raise the minimum wage to $25/hr. https://t.co/REYOIXgCD7

Trump always finds the money for endless war, and his fascist ICE army, but never for healthcare in our communities.

Since Republicans passed his Big Ugly Bill, over 8 million people have lost healthcare coverage. It's a disgrace.

Our communities deserve to come first.

I joined the National Fair Housing Alliance to affirm a truth we all hold; access to safe, affordable housing is a human right.

I stand with the advocates that are continuing to push for housing for all.

Trump must sign the Housing Our Communities Act into law now. https://t.co/bybGJv6GOX

Today, a record 187 Members of Congress joined me and @repdeliaramirez to vote to end U.S. support for the Israeli government's ethnic cleansing campaign in Lebanon. Our anti-war movement is growing—keep speaking out. We must keep fighting to save lives.

Growing up in Southwest Detroit in a multi-ethnic community centered on love and family taught me that our diversity is our strength. This Immigrant Heritage Month we uplift the stories of so many families, like mine, whose contributions have helped shape our country. https://t.co/i4Y3vKEkdT

This week, the House will vote on an amendment that would block $3.3 billion in military funding for the Israeli apartheid regime. I will vote yes.

We should not spend another cent arming a military that is committing genocide in Palestine, ethnically cleansing Lebanon, and

I offered 26 amendments to the NDAA.

The amendments are intended to uphold human rights at home and abroad, protect our servicemembers, block U.S.-Israeli military integration and end U.S. participation in war crimes.

Our shared humanity must be centered in all our policies. https://t.co/E1biKr5T4p

The Trump administration is assisting the Israeli government as it bombs children in Lebanon. In just 25 days, nearly 1000 more people have died while Congress lacks the courage to end U.S. participation in this invasion. We must pass the Lebanon War Powers Resolution today. https://t.co/eTYjUrtPld

If you are born here, you are a citizen. Birthright Citizenship is the law of the land. The President cannot rewrite the plain text of the Constitution. It's a disgrace that 3 Supreme Court Justices think he can.

Our fight continues, we must defend the Fourteenth Amendment!
RT @DropSiteNews: 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 U.S. Rep. Rashida Tlaib’s message to the Lebanese Aoun government after it recently agreed to a framework agreement…

RT @justfp: "US is not a bystander to these war crimes — it is an active participant"

"Nearly 1,000 additional people have already been ki…

I came to Congress because our communities deserve real investment. I'm proud to have delivered millions in Community Project Funding to strengthen our neighborhoods, create opportunities, and help ensure every resident feels seen, valued, and loved. https://t.co/xGyb3dIEU1

The same folks telling us that we can't afford to raise the minimum wage to $25 an hour, are the same people voting to spend billions on the Department of War that hasn't passed 8 audits in a row. It's shameful. Congress must pass the Living Wage for All Act now! https://t.co/U53YRhtF1K

Tomorrow, I will force another vote to end U.S. participation in the Israeli apartheid regime's campaign of ethnic cleansing and territorial expansion in Lebanon.

Over 4,250 people have been massacred. Twelve children are killed or maimed every day as these U.S.-backed war

36th District Court should enforce Detroit's rental-safety laws in eviction court. It's outrageous that slumlords are being allowed to obtain nonpayment judgments for rent they were not legally allowed to collect. I support the Detroit Tenants Union's fight for housing justice!
We are proud to honor Matthew Godette as the winner of the Congressional Art Competition. Thank you for your creativity, you have made the 12th District very proud! https://t.co/kr9ckBmHr9
When consumers switch from using bank accounts to private fintech products, we're losing consumer protections and there are hidden fees that are hurting our families. https://t.co/Rsj41Yqzet

Trump's corrupt Supreme Court majority has decided that our Haitian and Syrian neighbors' lives are disposable. Families who have built their lives here deserve safety, not fear. Congress must act now: protect TPS, pass the Haitian TPS Resolution, and restore dignity to our https://t.co/1xqEqoofSy

ICE is abducting people, tearing apart families, and caging our immigrant neighbors. This rouge administration is engaging in an inhumane and cruel system of immigration. Congress must pass the Find Our Families Act now. https://t.co/4yuoA3zyPL

The American people are tired of bailing out big banks after their risky and illegal actions. The Bank Failure Accountability Act ensures that if senior employees tank their company chasing a payout, it's their own money that will be on the line. https://t.co/Ohy1fawIGL

Auto insurance premiums are out of control, and drivers deserve to know how their personal information and identity influences rates. The Federal Insurance Office must investigate algorithmic discrimination and other factors that drive up costs in insurance pricing models. https://t.co/JFO8phE7Ms

Families across the country are struggling with high housing costs. But Trump's already admitted he "couldn't care less" about affordability. He'd rather demand that the GOP rig our elections than deliver real relief to our families. Shame on him. Sign the damn bill. https://t.co/k2FVL1gl7w

Dobbs ripped away a constitutional right and put politics between patients and doctors. Four years later, as extremists continue their campaign to ban abortion nationwide, we continue fighting back to protect the right to reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy.

When @RepLaMonica stepped up to defend her constituents and neighbors being ripped away from their families, this authoritarian administration arrested her and filed sham charges against her. Her fight is our fight. I stand with LaMonica. https://t.co/Zww6eVVLHe

You can't claim to care about children's health while cutting medical research, dismantling public health protections, and sowing doubt about proven vaccines. 

Today, @OversightDems heard from experts about the consequences of this administration's actions and what comes next.

These sentences are a travesty and totally unjustified, but that's the point. Americans hate the fascist Trump regime, so the only way they can try to cling to power is brute force. NSPM-7 is a grave threat to all of us and more bullshit "terrorism" charges like these are coming.

DTE is constantly raising rates & forcing us to foot the bill for more reliable service. DTE makes record profits year after year and avoids paying federal income taxes. When they raise our rates DTE is choosing shareholder payouts over customers. Pass my Make DTE Pay Act today!

I was proud to bring home $2.5 million in community project funding for Minock Park Place Senior Housing in Detroit. What was once a vacant building is now home to 42 affordable housing units for seniors who deserve a safe place to live with dignity and respect. https://t.co/jBOeQVxuMJ

Water is a human right. I’m proud to secure $1,092,000 in federal funding for Garden City to upgrade its aging water infrastructure so every home and business can count on clean, safe, and reliable water. Let's continue investing in our public health and a stronger community. https://t.co/HcWohwYqDT

Michigan put America on wheels, but rising costs are making transportation unaffordable for our residents.

Now is the time to make serious investments in fast, reliable, and free public transit.

Read my new op-ed: 
https://t.co/aBMAntuvXw https://t.co/nj3TdGes48

We had an engaging coffee hour last week at the Westland Public Library. Showing up for our community means more than just words, it’s about taking action and delivering resources. I always have your back and fight for our families in Congress. Thank you to all who attended. https://t.co/b9AHgvgNae

Juneteenth marks the moment the message of freedom reached the last enslaved Black Americans in Texas. This Juneteenth, let's commit to taking action to pass the Reparations Now Resolution and work towards delivering real justice and equity for our Black neighbors. https://t.co/0nJqvcPDWg
